steps.title: Match corresponding angles
steps.content:
Because the triangles are similar, corresponding angles have equal tangent values. Angle $R$ corresponds to angle $U$, so
$$\tan(U)=\frac{36}{5}$$

steps.title: Use complementary tangents
steps.content:
Angles $U$ and $V$ are the two acute angles in a right triangle, so their tangent values are reciprocals.
$$\tan(V)=\frac{1}{\tan(U)}=\frac{1}{\frac{36}{5}}=\frac{5}{36}$$The answer is 5/36.
